name: Stickman Fighter: Space War
description: You are the legend of the village of Stickman Legend, the only force able to withstand and defeat the oncoming waves of evil from Space. Earn money, upgrade your skills, items, buy new weapons. Have a lot of fun playing this game.
instructions: Use WASD or Arrows to move and Mouse to use skills
tags: Boys, Fight, Fighting, Fun, Girls, Space, Stickman, War
